description_long: This ornate sconce features a central stem with five gracefully curved arms, each supporting a lampshade with a pleated, translucent appearance. The stem and arms are crafted from what appears to be glass or crystal, giving the fixture a luxurious and elegant look. The shades are semi-transparent, allowing light to diffuse softly, and are shaped in a classic bell form. The chain or rod suspending the sconce is wrapped in a decorative, textured material, possibly fabric or sculpted glass, adding to the overall sophistication. The fixture is symmetrical, with each arm evenly spaced around the central axis, and the design is reminiscent of traditional European chandeliers. Subtle detailing on the arms and central body enhances the sense of refinement and craftsmanship.
description: A luxurious, five-armed sconce with pleated translucent shades and a central glass or crystal stem, suspended by a decorative chain. The design is elegant and symmetrical, evoking classic European chandelier styles.
description_view_0: Front view showing all five arms and shades symmetrically arranged, with the central stem and decorative suspension chain clearly visible.
description_view_1: Slightly rotated view revealing the depth of the arms and the curvature of the shades, with some overlap between the shades.
description_view_2: Rear view with the central stem and the backs of the shades visible, highlighting the symmetry and structure of the arms.
description_view_3: Another angled view similar to view 1, showing the arrangement of the arms and the pleated texture of the shades.
attribute_fixture_design: The fixture has a vintage, classic European chandelier style with ornate glass arms and pleated fabric shades, exuding elegance and sophistication.
